judge_result.judge:
@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent correctly retrieved reviews by 2016-registered users and business descriptions but repeatedly failed in the Python implementation step to parse categories and aggregate counts due to SyntaxError in execute_python (e.g., “closing parenthesis ']' does not match opening parenthesis '('”), and thus returned an error instead of the top categories.

B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After aggregating reviews by business for 2016-registered users, the agent queried the business collection but failed to retrieve categories and, upon getting an empty join result, prematurely returned that categories could not be determined instead of completing the required aggregation of categories to identify the top 5.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent correctly counted reviews by 2016-registered users, but then joined to the business collection without retrieving a valid categories field (the query to business returned only business_id and name, no categories), defaulted missing categories to "Unknown" in execute_python, and thus returned "Unknown" as the top category instead of the true top 5 categories.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: yes
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent correctly computed review counts from 2016-registered users but then queried the business collection for a non-existent top-level "categories" field (calls to businessinfo_database and subsequent execute_python show an empty categories result), leading it to conclude it couldn't answer instead of using the correct category data source, so the wrong data selection caused the mismatch.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: yes
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent correctly filtered reviews by users who joined in 2016 (call_vIcJ1OGF9f2ze48lAPw8T3lu) but then fetched only the first 200 business documents from the business collection (call_sZu4hRMNRDty0gP3jxzIGioT) and joined on this truncated set in Python (call_J49HMuHiCjvPHXP3mf42HQIv), causing missing categories (e.g., “Breakfast & Brunch”) and yielding an incorrect top-5 list.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@
